g.text: Media Stack: Docker host CT 842 · media-01 · 192.168.40.42

Seerr sends requests to Sonarr and Radarr; Prowlarr feeds their indexers and FlareSolverr clears challenges. Grabs go to qBittorrent, whose only route out is Gluetun to Proton VPN. Finished files hard-link into the libraries Jellyfin serves back to the viewer.
